revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Pathnavbox| *{{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|建築|日本の建築|日本の建築史|日本の建築史 (時代別)}} *{{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|文化|日本の文化|日本の文化史|平安時代の文化}} *{{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|歴史|日本の歴史|平安時代|平安時代の文化}} }} [[平安時代]]の、[[日本建築]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{先代次代|[[日本建築史]]|'''Category:平安時代の建築'''
794年-1185年|[[:Category:奈良時代の建築]]
710年-794年
|[[:Category:鎌倉時代の建築]]
1185年-1333年}} {{Commonscat|Architecture of Heian period}} ==関連カテゴリ== *[[:Category:日本の国宝 (建造物)]] *[[:Category:神社]] *[[:Category:日本の寺]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:平安時代の建築]]}} ==Old Content== This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:Heian-kyō]]. {{translated page|ja|Category:平安時代の建築|version=85417262|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:History_of_Japanese_architecture_(by_period)]] [[Category:Moved jawiki pages]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki but with commons link]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:wikimedia commons named categories]] [[Category:平安時代の文化]] [[category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[commons:Category:Architecture of Heian period]] [[ja:Category:平安時代の建築]] [[ko:Category:헤이안 시대의 건축]] [[zh:Category:平安時代建築]]

794年-1185年|[[:Category:奈良時代の建築]]
710年-794年
|[[:Category:鎌倉時代の建築]]
1185年-1333年}} {{Commonscat|Architecture of Heian period}} ==関連カテゴリ== *[[:Category:日本の国宝 (建造物)]] *[[:Category:神社]] *[[:Category:日本の寺]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:平安時代の建築]]}} ==Old Content== This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:Heian-kyō]]. {{translated page|ja|Category:平安時代の建築|version=85417262|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:History_of_Japanese_architecture_(by_period)]] [[Category:Moved jawiki pages]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki but with commons link]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:wikimedia commons named categories]] [[Category:Culture of the Heian Period]] [[category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[commons:Category:Architecture of Heian period]] [[ja:Category:平安時代の建築]] [[ko:Category:헤이안 시대의 건축]] [[zh:Category:平安時代建築]]

Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "==関連カテゴリ==" to "==Related Categories=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9643299)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Pathnavbox| *{{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|建築|日本の建築|日本の建築史|日本の建築史 (時代別)}} *{{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|文化|日本の文化|日本の文化史|平安時代の文化}} *{{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|歴史|日本の歴史|平安時代|平安時代の文化}} }} [[平安時代]]の、[[日本建築]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{先代次代|[[日本建築史]]|'''Category:平安時代の建築'''
794年-1185年|[[:Category:奈良時代の建築]]
710年-794年
|[[:Category:鎌倉時代の建築]]
1185年-1333年}} {{Commonscat|Architecture of Heian period}} ==Related Categories== *[[:Category:日本の国宝 (建造物)]] *[[:Category:神社]] *[[:Category:日本の寺]] ==Local Content== {{先代次代|[[日本建築史]]|'''Category:平安時代の建築'''
794年-1185年|[[:Category:奈良時代の建築]]
710年-794年
|[[:Category:鎌倉時代の建築]]
1185年-1333年}} {{Commonscat|Architecture of Heian period}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:平安時代の建築}} {{translated page|ja|Category:平安時代の建築|version=85417262}} [[co:commons:Category:Architecture of Heian period]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:Category:平安時代の建築]] [[ko:Category:헤이안 시대의 건축]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:Heian-kyō]] [[zh:Category:平安時代建築]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Culture of the Heian Period]] [[Category:History_of_Japanese_architecture_(by_period)]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki but with commons link]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[Category:wikimedia commons named categories]] [[Category:pages]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
